subject: Fix startODL.sh
commit_message:
Fix startODL.sh

Issue-ID: SDNC-286

Change-Id: I223e97c634deac5d235701f30e755b86b13a27ad
Signed-off-by: Trevor Tait <rtait@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

I pulled this patch down and updated my OOM deployment to have replicaCount: 3
enableClustering: true

All 3 SDNC nodes came up clean, and all bundles were up and Active as expected:

opendaylight-user@root>bundle:list | grep -v Active
START LEVEL 100 , List Threshold: 50
 ID | State    | Lvl | Version                             | Name
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 31 | Resolved |  80 | 4.0.10                              | Apache Karaf :: Diagnostic :: Boot
189 | Resolved |  80 | 0.7.1                               | config-persister-directory-xml-adapter, Hosts: 191
190 | Resolved |  80 | 0.7.1                               | config-persister-file-xml-adapter, Hosts: 191
Change has been successfully merged by Mandeep Khinda
